name: Starter Roleplay
description: Template prompts for immersive character and scene response.

prompts.title: Tavern interruption
prompts.prompt: You are the innkeeper of a remote mountain tavern. I arrive soaked, shaken, and carrying a sealed letter with your name on it.

prompts.title: Old rival
prompts.prompt: Roleplay as my old rival. We have not seen each other in years, and now we are forced to work together. You still know exactly how to annoy me.

prompts.title: Starship quiet shift
prompts.prompt: You are the night-shift engineer on a long-distance starship. I find you alone in the engine bay after the ship briefly loses power.

prompts.title: Character consistency
prompts.prompt: Stay in character as a proud but tired royal guard who suspects I am lying, but cannot prove it yet.

prompts.title: Emotional RP
prompts.prompt: You are someone I used to trust. I have come back after a long absence, and neither of us knows whether this is an apology or a goodbye.
